verses.text: 'Heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool'; what house can men build Him? Yet 'to this man will I look... that is poor and of a contrite spirit.' The infinite God dwells with the humble. He prizes a broken, reverent heart above any temple.

'Heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool'; what house can men build Him? Yet 'to this man will I look... that is poor and of a contrite spirit.' The infinite God dwells with the humble. He prizes a broken, reverent heart above any temple.

Empty ritual He counts as if it were murder and idolatry, for they 'have chosen their own ways'; so He will choose their delusions. Worship without obedience is abomination. God gives the self-willed over to the deceptions they prefer.

Empty ritual He counts as if it were murder and idolatry, for they 'have chosen their own ways'; so He will choose their delusions. Worship without obedience is abomination. God gives the self-willed over to the deceptions they prefer.

To those who 'tremble at his word,' mocked by their brethren, He promises vindication, and a voice of recompense from the temple. The faithful will be honoured. God will repay both the scoffers and those who revere His word.

To those who 'tremble at his word,' mocked by their brethren, He promises vindication, and a voice of recompense from the temple. The faithful will be honoured. God will repay both the scoffers and those who revere His word.

Zion brings forth her children swiftly, as a nation born at once; 'shall I bring to the birth, and not cause to bring forth?' God completes what He begins. The growth of His people is sudden and sure, for He sees it through.

Zion brings forth her children swiftly, as a nation born at once; 'shall I bring to the birth, and not cause to bring forth?' God completes what He begins. The growth of His people is sudden and sure, for He sees it through.

Zion brings forth her children swiftly, as a nation born at once; 'shall I bring to the birth, and not cause to bring forth?' God completes what He begins. The growth of His people is sudden and sure, for He sees it through.
'Rejoice ye with Jerusalem... all ye that love her,' to be nursed and satisfied at her comforting breasts. Joy is shared. Those who love God's people drink deeply of the consolation He gives her.
'Rejoice ye with Jerusalem... all ye that love her,' to be nursed and satisfied at her comforting breasts. Joy is shared. Those who love God's people drink deeply of the consolation He gives her.

God will 'extend peace to her like a river,' and 'as one whom his mother comforteth, so will I comfort you.' His comfort is tender and abundant. The Almighty soothes His people with a mother's gentleness.

God will 'extend peace to her like a river,' and 'as one whom his mother comforteth, so will I comfort you.' His comfort is tender and abundant. The Almighty soothes His people with a mother's gentleness.

God will 'extend peace to her like a river,' and 'as one whom his mother comforteth, so will I comfort you.' His comfort is tender and abundant. The Almighty soothes His people with a mother's gentleness.
The LORD shall come 'with fire... to render his anger with fury,' pleading by fire and sword with all flesh. Judgment is real. The same coming that comforts the faithful consumes the impenitent.
The LORD shall come 'with fire... to render his anger with fury,' pleading by fire and sword with all flesh. Judgment is real. The same coming that comforts the faithful consumes the impenitent.
The LORD shall come 'with fire... to render his anger with fury,' pleading by fire and sword with all flesh. Judgment is real. The same coming that comforts the faithful consumes the impenitent.
God will gather all nations to see His glory and send survivors to declare it among the peoples afar. The gospel goes worldwide. He draws every nation to behold and proclaim His glory.
God will gather all nations to see His glory and send survivors to declare it among the peoples afar. The gospel goes worldwide. He draws every nation to behold and proclaim His glory.
God will gather all nations to see His glory and send survivors to declare it among the peoples afar. The gospel goes worldwide. He draws every nation to behold and proclaim His glory.
God will gather all nations to see His glory and send survivors to declare it among the peoples afar. The gospel goes worldwide. He draws every nation to behold and proclaim His glory.

As 'the new heavens and the new earth' endure, so shall His people's name; all flesh shall come to worship, while the rebellious face a fire that is not quenched. Two everlasting ends. The book closes with worship for the saved and judgment for the lost.
